sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n586" key="a)gkuloglw/xin" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκῠλο-γλώχιν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῑνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, of a cock, <sense id="n586.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with hooked spurs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:17:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
